step.name: inventory-business-operations
step.action: Identify business operations (place_order, cancel_subscription, recompute_invoice). For each, list its callers.

step.name: name-and-group-by-aggregate
step.action: Group operations by aggregate. Choose module path: app/services/<aggregate>.py.

step.name: extract-logic-into-services
step.action: Move logic. Replace HttpRequest with primitives. Wrap DB writes in transaction.atomic().

step.name: author-direct-tests
step.action: Write pytest cases that call service functions with pydantic inputs. Use factory_boy for fixtures.
step.decision-gate: If a service is hard to test directly, its inputs are still leaking HTTP — refactor.

step.name: migrate-callers
step.action: Update each caller to invoke the service. Run import-linter to confirm no service has django.http import and no view has ORM call.
